title: melilotus indicus subsp. permixtus
intro: Melilotus indicus subsp. permixtus, also known as the mixed yellow sweet clover or mixed melilot, is a plant species within the genus Melilotus. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its isoflavones and other compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as arthritis, fever, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Melilotus indicus subsp. permixtus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
